response:
module1  
pizzelle is a sweet young toon girl who runs a donut shop in a small town. she makes donuts every day to feed a dozen people just in case. her shop rarely gets customers but she always makes enough to feed a dozen. she has no one to give her extra supply to and if they aren't eaten soon they will spoil. she doesn't want to throw away so many perfectly fine donuts so she resorts to a third option; eating all of them herself.

module2  
she eats all of them herself and becomes incredibly and attractively overweight in doing so. she realizes that her overabundance of donuts presents a problem: she has nobody to give her extra supply to and if they aren't eaten soon they'll spoil. she also doesn't want to throw away so many, perfectly fine donuts, so she resorts to a third option; eating all of them herself.

module3  
the pen is mightier than sword. the pen is mightier than sword. the pen is mightier than sword.

module4
